CONTENT.Honours: ZamalekEgyptian Premier League: 2014–15Egypt Cup: 2014–15, 2015–16Egyptian Super Cup: 2016EgyptAfrica Cup of Nations: Runner-up 2017
CONTENT.Club career: Gabr signed for Zamalek in June 2014. His performances resulted in his selection for the Egyptian national team. Zamalek won the Egyptian Premier league 2014–15.On 29 January 2018, Gabr joined West Bromwich Albion  on a six-month loan deal worth €500,000 with a €2.5 million option to buy at the end of the season with Zamalek retaining a 10% sell-on clause.On 10 July 2018, Gabr joined Pyramids after West Bromwich turned down the option to sign the defender on a permanent deal.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the Pyramids FC websiteAli Gabr – UEFA competition record (archive)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 10 March 2024As of match played 7 January 2024.
CONTENT.International career: He was called up for the national team under Shawky Gharib on 4 June 2014 in a friendly game against Jamaica.In May 2018, Gabr was named in Egypt's squad for the 2018 World Cup in Russia.

SUMMARY: Ali Gabr Gabr Mossad (Arabic: علي جبر جبر مسعد; born 10 January 1989) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays for Egyptian Premier League side Pyramids and the Egyptian national team as a centre-back.
